title: The Giants Come for the Sun God
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Sanji, Unknown person #8, Kuma, Unknown person #9, Bonney as Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.
scene: Kuma arrives at Egghead, Bonney confronts Saturn, Vegapunk is threatened, and the island falls into a full Buster Call-level crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure to get you both in one slash, so you can be together...

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: It won't hurt a bit, Bonney.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Aha ha ha ha ha ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What the?! was that straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: After that snack, I'm at full power!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it me or is the island shaking?

summary: This part advances the Egghead Buster Call through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
